hero.subline: I develop modern business websites with clear structure, premium design, and strong performance. For brands that want to look professional online without feeling generic.

preview.title: Daisy May's Salon
preview.description: An elegant brand presence for a modern salon focused on trust, aesthetics, and clear conversion paths.

valueProposition.label: Why NuVioLabs
valueProposition.description: Your website should do more than look good. It should build trust fast, guide people clearly, and turn visits into real inquiries. That is what this structure is designed for.
valueProposition.ctaTitle: Design becomes a reliable lead channel.
valueProposition.ctaText: Structure, messaging, and performance work together so your website feels professional, earns trust faster, and makes the next step easy.

architecture.title: Clear positioning
architecture.description: Visitors understand within seconds what you offer, who it is for, and why they should work with you.

execution.title: Design with impact
execution.description: A refined visual identity sets you apart, builds trust, and directs attention toward the actions that matter.

scalability.title: Built cleanly
scalability.description: Fast, mobile-optimized, and implemented so the site can grow later without friction.

work.sectionSubtitle: Two real client projects. From brief to launch.
work.previewGdprText: Loading the live preview will establish a connection to external servers. Your IP address may be transmitted in the process.

wt-erdbewegungen.title: WT Erdbewegungen
wt-erdbewegungen.description: A local web presence for excavation and earthmoving.
wt-erdbewegungen.problem: The company was nearly invisible online. Potential clients had no clear digital first touchpoint.
wt-erdbewegungen.approach: A focused company website with a clear service structure, local SEO foundations, and a mobile-first build.
wt-erdbewegungen.outcome1: A clear digital entry point for new project inquiries
wt-erdbewegungen.outcome2: Fast mobile performance and cleaner user flow
wt-erdbewegungen.outcome3: Stronger visibility in the local market
wt-erdbewegungen.testimonial: “We finally get found online, and the site now feels as professional as our work.”

daisymays-salon.title: Daisy May's Salon
daisymays-salon.description: A multilingual brand presence for a modern dog salon.
daisymays-salon.problem: Inquiries came in through social media and phone without structure. Services, pricing, and expectations were not explained in one place.
daisymays-salon.approach: An elegant bilingual website that structures the offer clearly, builds trust, and answers recurring questions before contact happens.
daisymays-salon.outcome3: More time for appointments instead of explanations
daisymays-salon.testimonial: “My day-to-day feels much calmer now because the website answers the most important questions upfront.”

about.label: About
about.headline: Digital Craftsmanship.
about.bio1: I'm Axel, an independent developer. I focus on building resilient, high-performance systems that deliver real business value—without the agency noise.
about.bio2: I build platforms for small and mid-sized businesses that work as a quiet, reliable lead channel. No buzzwords. Just results you can measure.

clarity.title: Clarity
clarity.text: Transparent process and clear, direct communication.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.text: Clean code that stays maintainable as you grow.

about.techStack: Built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

lab.sectionSubtitle: Digital products demand absolute stability. Complex interactions, rendering limits, and new architecture patterns need robust testing in isolated R&D sprints. What proves itself under load here becomes the reliable standard for future client systems. No playgrounds. Only targeted validation.

fluidGeometry.problem: Abrupt UI state changes disrupt navigation flow, increase cognitive load, and signal poor product quality.
fluidGeometry.approach: Developing interpolated vector paths via Framer Motion & SVG, calculated off the main thread. Rendering stable 60fps animations that adapt to scroll velocity.
fluidGeometry.value: Frictionless visual feedback during critical micro-interactions (e.g., checkout or form validation), indirectly boosting user trust and time-on-site.

audioViz.problem: Web-based dashboards often collapse at the hardware level when rendering extremely dense, reactive data streams (audio, live analytics, tracking).
audioViz.approach: Offloading the render pipeline from the DOM directly to the GPU using WebGL/Canvas API and isolated Web Workers for data processing.
audioViz.value: Resilient architectures for data-heavy B2B interfaces that fluidly display complex live metrics without frame drops, even on low-power devices.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: We take the protection of your personal data very seriously. We treat your personal data confidentially and in accordance with the statutory data protection regulations and this privacy policy.
privacy.hosting:
Our website is hosted by Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, USA.
Personal data collected on this website is processed on Vercel's servers.

Data transfer to the US is based on the EU Standard Contractual Clauses in accordance with Art. 46 GDPR.

Further information on data protection at Vercel can be found at:
https://vercel.com/legal/privacy-policy
privacy.contactForm: If you send us inquiries via the contact form, your details from the inquiry form, including the contact details you provided there, will be processed and stored via Resend for the purpose of processing the inquiry and in case of follow-up questions. We do not share this data without your consent.

privacy.ssl: For security reasons and to protect the transmission of confidential content, such as inquiries you send to us, this site uses SSL or TLS encryption.
privacy.logfiles:
The provider of the pages automatically collects and stores information in server log files (e.g. browser type/version, OS, referrer URL, host name, time, IP address). These data are not combined with other data sources.
The basis for data processing is Art. 6 (1) (f) GDPR.
privacy.rights: You have the right at any time to free information about your stored personal data, its origin and recipient and the purpose of data processing, and a right to correction, blocking or deletion of this data. For questions you can contact us at any time.
privacy.complaintTitle: 7. Right of Appeal to the Supervisory Authority
privacy.complaint: In the event of violations of the GDPR, data subjects have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.

cost.q: How much does a new website cost?
cost.a: Every project is different. Most sites start around €800. In our first call, we'll define scope, goals, and budget—so you get a realistic, transparent estimate.

duration.q: How long does the build take?
duration.a: Usually a few weeks, depending on scope and how prepared the content is. A clear plan keeps things structured and efficient.

hosting.q: Do I need to handle hosting or the technical side?
hosting.a: Not necessarily. If you want, I can handle hosting, updates, and maintenance. Or we plug into your existing setup.

cms.a: Yes. Small updates are always possible. If you want to maintain content yourself, we can choose a setup that fits.
